name: Midac Co.,Ltd.
summary: Midac Co.,Ltd. engages in the collection, transportation, and disposal of industrial waste and specially controlled industrial waste in Japan. It also collects and transports general business waste, and general household waste and consignment from local governments; and sells industrial, special managed industrial, and general wastes, as well as offers recycling services. The company was founded in 1945 and is headquartered in Hamamatsu, Japan.
